corrections.location: XVI 1, first word after chapter break
corrections.note: Printed verse begins with lowercase καὶ, not capital Καὶ.
The apparatus reads eta with circumflex, not alpha with grave.

corrections.location: 35, witness note after 'αιτεις αυται sup ras'
corrections.note: Witness siglum is printed without a space.
Circumflex on subjunctive eta is visible.

notes: Bottom page number in scan is 659, so the trailing transcription lines '659 / ΤΓʹ 2' do not match the image; not reported as corrections because they lie outside the marked page transcription structure. Running head and body otherwise match scan closely.
